scripts.dev:api: cd backend/api && uv run uvicorn main:app --reload --port 4000
scripts.dev:worker: cd backend/worker && uv run celery -A worker worker --loglevel=info
scripts.docker:dev:rebuild: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f compose.dev.yml down && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f compose.dev.yml up --build -d
scripts.docker:dev:reset: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f compose.dev.yml down -v && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f compose.dev.yml up --build -d
scripts.start:web: npm run build -w @mentico/web && npm run start -w @mentico/web
